title: quercus mongolica var. liaotungensis
intro: Quercus mongolica var. liaotungensis, also known as Manchurian oak or Liaodong oak, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the family Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Quercus mongolica var. liaotungensis include reducing fever, relieving cough, and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as its potential in lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which are often combined with other medicinal herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
